title: Verify Poly studio Settings
scenario: Verify all menu options in Poly Studio Settings (General, Find My Device, User Guides, Support, Color Theme, Feedback) display and function correctly.
steps: Open app as guest, tap hamburger icon, go to General, and verify options (Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, Licenses) are present.
Go back, click Find My Device, and verify the screen displays.
Click User Guides and verify the Onboarding page displays.
Go back, click Support, and verify the Support page displays.
Go back, click Color Theme, verify options (Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, Dark Theme) are present, and confirm the theme applies correctly.
Go back, click Feedback, and verify the Feedback page displays.
expected: All menu items in Poly Studio Settings are functional and display the correct screens/options as described.
